TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Isaac Herzog Isaac Herzog (ryax sa 22 na byacing tay 9 squ kawas na 1960 - squ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1960) mrhuw Israel ta' misuw hya' ga Isaac Herzog, aring ryax tay 7 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Isaac Herzog minkahul sa Tel Aviv na Israel. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1960 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: is~…ēaa ¶~ ® ńßerzo…£ is~…ēaa ¶~ ® ńßerzo…£ (rjax s~…ēa ** na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** - s~…ēqu), ńßja …£a s~…ēquliq na pklańßaŇč …£a…£a. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw is~…ērael ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a is~…ēaa ¶~ ® ńßerzo…£, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral is~…ēaa ¶~ ® ńßerzo…£ minkańßul s~…ēa tel a*i* na is~…ērael. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
